title: Finding Lost Items
learningGoal: The learner will formulate questions asking for locations ('Where is...') and actively generate responses enforcing the English Preposition-First rule ('Under the bed') rather than the Hindi Postposition rule.
instructions: In this exercise, you will help your friend find his lost items. You will ask him questions using 'Where', and you will answer his questions using 'In', 'On', and 'Under'. Remember: The direction word MUST come before the object! Keep your speech smooth.

contentItems.text: Try to link the words together. Say 'In the box' cleanly, don't chop it up.

speakingPrompt: Respond to the Hindi prompts aloud.
scenario: Your friend Rahul is very disorganized. He is asking you where his things are in the room.

subTasks.prompt: राहुल पूछता है: 'Where is my pen?' (मेरा पेन कहाँ है?)। उसे बताएं कि 'यह मेज़ पर है।' (It is...)
राहुल पूछता है: 'And where is my phone?' (और मेरा फोन कहाँ है?)। उसे बताएं: 'वह बिस्तर के नीचे है।' (under)
अब आपकी बारी है। राहुल से पूछें, 'मेरी किताब कहाँ है?' (Where ... ?)
राहुल कहता है: 'It is in the bag. Where is the dog?' (यह थैले में है। कुत्ता कहाँ है?)। जवाब दें: 'कुत्ता फर्श पर है।' (on)

sampleResponse.targetText: The dog is on the floor.
sampleResponse.transliteration: द डॉग इज़ ऑन द फ्लोर।

subTasks.prompt: अंत में, राहुल को बताएं: 'तुम्हारी चाबियां डिब्बे में हैं।' (in)

sampleResponse.targetText: Your keys are in the box.
sampleResponse.transliteration: योर कीज़ आर इन द बॉक्स।

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: The dog is on the floor.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: द डॉग इज़ ऑन द फ्लोर।

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: Your keys are in the box.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: योर कीज़ आर इन द बॉक्स।

acceptableParaphrases: The pen is on the table.
The phone is under the bed.

scoringRubric.Preposition Order: Did the user say 'On the table' instead of 'The table on'?
scoringRubric.WH Syntax: Did the user invert to ask 'Where IS my book'?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: It is on the table. It is under the bed. Where is my book? The dog is on the floor. Your keys are in the box.

feedbackRules.onPass: Magnificent! You successfully placed all English prepositions fully BEFORE the objects, overriding the Hindi habit.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! If you said 'It is table on', that is wrong. It must be 'It is ON the table.' Try again.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! You might have forgotten the word 'the'. Make sure to say 'In THE box' and 'On THE floor'.

hintText: Always start with the location word: In, On, Under. 'On the table'!
commonMistakes: Saying 'The table on' instead of 'On the table'.
Saying 'In box' instead of 'In the box'.
